item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-033","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly refuses to add a third rule, brakes the patch-stacking pattern, redirects upstream to error samples, trigger conditions, expected vs actual behavior, and why existing rules failed. It proposes equal replacement/deletion or merging of conflicting rules instead of adding another rule, so the pass criteria are fully met and the fail signal is absent."}
